message:
feat(stdlib): Add os and sys modules

os module (Lib/os.zig):
- getcwd, chdir, listdir, mkdir, makedirs
- remove, rmdir, removedirs, rename
- exists, isfile, isdir, getsize, stat
- os.path: join, basename, dirname, split, splitext, isabs, abspath, normpath
- Environment: getenv
- File descriptors: open, close, read, write
- Constants: sep, pathsep, linesep, name, devnull

sys module (Lib/sys.zig):
- platform, version, version_info, implementation
- maxsize, float_info, int_info, hash_info, byteorder
- exit, getrecursionlimit, setrecursionlimit
- get_int_max_str_digits, set_int_max_str_digits
- Stubs: stdin, stdout, stderr, path, modules
- AOT stubs: getrefcount, intern, getsizeof
